overview.description: The Liberty One Tactical Income ETF (LOTI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF investing in US large-cap dividend-paying stocks and fixed-income securities. The fund blends equity and bond allocations to pursue income and capital growth, focusing on stability and sectors the adviser deems recession resistant. LOTI was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by Liberty One.
